title: Positive flow: Start the Sorting Quiz
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate and press the 'START' button.
expected_result: The app should transition to the next screen of the Sorting Quiz.

title: Negative flow: No 'START' button present
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button.
expected_result: The 'START' button should not be present on the screen.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is disabled
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button. | Attempt to press the 'START' button.
expected_result: The 'START' button should be disabled and not respond to a press.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is not visible
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button.
expected_result: The 'START' button should be visible on the screen.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is not clickable
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button. | Attempt to press the 'START' button.
expected_result: The 'START' button should not be clickable.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is not accessible
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is not usable
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button. | Attempt to press the 'START' button.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is not responsive
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button. | Attempt to press the 'START' button.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is not persistent
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button. | Attempt to press the 'START' button.

title: Negative flow: 'START' button is not interactive
test_steps: Open the app. | Locate the 'START' button. | Attempt to press the 'START' button.
